---
title: "People"
description: "Members of CogDyn Lab"
---

## Principal investigator

::: {.people-card}
![](assets/person-placeholder.svg){fig-alt="Placeholder portrait" width="120"}

### Prof. Your Name

Assistant Professor / Principal Investigator  
Department, University  
Email: <your.email@university.edu>  
Interests: computational cognition, decision-making, cognitive dynamics
:::

## Graduate students

::: {.people-card}
![](assets/person-placeholder.svg){fig-alt="Placeholder portrait" width="120"}

### Student Name

Ph.D./M.S. student  
Research interests: learning, decision-making, modeling
:::

::: {.people-card}
![](assets/person-placeholder.svg){fig-alt="Placeholder portrait" width="120"}

### Student Name

M.S. student  
Research interests: behavioral experiments, human-AI interaction
:::

## Undergraduate researchers

- Student Name — topic or project
- Student Name — topic or project

## Alumni

- Alumni Name — Current position
